upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ko vA viSvajanInezu karmasu prAGawizyata' (Bawwi॰21.17) sarvAtmanA'yatizyata udayokzyata udayaMsyata
'sAndraM leQi rasAmftaM vicinute tAtparyamudrAM ca yaH saNGawate… kAvyaSramajYo janaH' (kA॰mI॰1.4).. saNGawate=yujyate
'ete drAgeva viGawizyante' BedaM prApsyanti palAyizyanta iti vA
'tato vijaGawe SElEH' (Bawwi0 1466) viGawitam SElA BedamApuH saMhatiM jahurityarTaH
'kAryamudGAwitaM kvApi maDye viGawate yataH' (hitopa0 42) viGawate=pratihanyate virAmameti
'mantriRA pfTivIpAlacittaM viGawitaM yadi valayaM sPawikasyeva ko nu sanDAtumarhati' (hitopa0 2157).. viGawitaM dviDA Binnam
'dahAmyahaM yuzmAnsadasyudGAwayAmi vA' (kaTA0 478) udGAwayAmi rahasyaM vo vivfRomi rahasyaM Binadmi guhyaM sUcayAmi
'viwajanapariGAwiteva vIRA' (mfcCa0 ) pariGAwitA spfzwA AmfzwA AhatA viwajananaKaGawwiteti pAWAntaram
